title: Fix: Sparks not saving on poor connections
description: Sparks entered during low-connectivity sessions were silently dropped instead of queuing for sync. Implemented offline write queue with retry logic. Sparks now persist locally and sync when connection is restored.

title: Fix: Kindle import fails for highlights with special characters
description: Highlights containing em dashes, smart quotes, or non-Latin characters caused the CSV parser to throw and abort the full import. Fixed parser to handle Unicode and special characters gracefully.

title: Fix: iOS Safari layout broken on notched screens
description: Navigation bar and bottom actions were obscured by the iPhone notch and home indicator on Safari. Applied safe-area-inset CSS variables to fix layout on all notched iOS devices.

title: Reduce initial load time by 40%
description: Audited and resolved key performance bottlenecks: lazy-loaded non-critical JS bundles, optimized Supabase query on library fetch, and added cache headers for static assets. Result: p75 load time reduced from 3.2s to 1.9s.

title: Add error logging and monitoring via Sentry
description: Integrated Sentry for frontend error tracking and performance monitoring. Configured alerts for unhandled exceptions and p95 load time regressions. No user-facing changes.

title: Export all data as JSON or markdown
description: As a privacy-conscious reader I want to export all my books, reading history, and Sparks as a JSON or markdown file so I own my data and can use it outside Bookworm.
